stories.one_line_premise: An Indian royal dynasty guards a secret immortality technique across generations until a descendant dares to choose mortality and love over eternal power.
stories.notes: Polished synopsis with Brahma-Narad comic angle, generational saga arc, and mythology. Dated Dec 29, 2025. Most developed mythological idea.

stories.one_line_premise: Two friends with elemental superpowers — one fire, one ice — grow from childhood conflict into a war that tests whether their bond can survive opposing natures.
stories.notes: Avatar-inspired. Three-part arc structured (childhood, teenage, adulthood). Strong character contrast. Dated Mar 26, 2023.

stories.one_line_premise: A man harbors both a god and a demon inside him — one seeks peace, the other destruction — and his struggle to contain both threatens the world around him.
stories.notes: Opening scene at Benaras ghats is very cinematic. Concept rich but plot undeveloped. Dated Jul 23, 2023.

stories.one_line_premise: A man named Danny unlocks an army of light beings inherited from his father's soul — to protect a weak boy from a shadow army in hell.
stories.notes: Vivid single scene only. Full story not developed. Dated Aug 27, 2022.

stories.one_line_premise: A king of the universe wields a shape-shifting steel bar inspired by the Monkey King — a character concept awaiting a story.
stories.notes: Character idea only. No story. Dated Jun 20, 2023.

stories.one_line_premise: Spirit beings from a shadow realm are transformed into cards and scattered across Earth, each bonding with a human whose personality matches — to compete for the highest power seat.
stories.notes: Interesting card-spirit system. World concept present, no characters. Dated Jun 22, 2022.

stories.one_line_premise: In a 52-card universe of power-ranked warriors, a rags-to-riches fighter rises through the ranks challenging kings, aces, and jokers across four houses in a century-spanning competition.
stories.notes: Highly developed. 52-card power system, multiple power levels, 15+ characters outlined. JJK/Black Clover inspired. Dated Sep 23, 2023.

stories.one_line_premise: In an AI-dystopia, the son of a visionary scientist discovers he holds the keys to a global cyberspace—and must use inherited genius to fight a corrupt AI before it consumes humanity.
stories.notes: Most developed sci-fi concept. Dual physical/cyberspace structure (40/60 split). Multiple character sketches. Dated Jun 20, 2023, with updates through Jul 6, 2025.

stories.one_line_premise: A lone cyberpunk operative who serves neither government nor enemy — a psycho wildcard who does whatever his mission demands, and always delivers.
stories.notes: Character concept only. No story, no plot, no world. Dated Dec 25, 2022.

stories.one_line_premise: A rogue, Avatar-spirit-inspired hacker collective infiltrates the bio-interfaces of cyborgs to puppeteer the powerful from the shadows.
stories.notes: Concept-level note. World building strong, story sparse. Dated Aug 17, 2025.

stories.one_line_premise: Seven people across the globe share the same face but different fates — and only one of them can prevent the others from destroying each other.
stories.notes: 7 character archetypes defined (P1–P7). Strong visual concept. Inspired by Juice WRLD. Dated Jul 17, 2022.

stories.one_line_premise: An alien warrior stands alone against four friends to save a galaxy — and his lover's planet — splitting them apart in the process.
stories.notes: One-sentence premise only. No date. Linked to Universal Saga character Thoulien.

stories.one_line_premise: A four-eyed alien warrior — The Chosen One — awakens with no memory and must journey through six stages of life to fulfil a cosmic destiny, losing love and sanity along the way.
stories.notes: Detailed character design (Thoulien Multiour). 6-stage linear arc with love arc, warrior arc, saga arc. Dated Apr 21, 2023.

stories.one_line_premise: Two world-class drifters — one a cop, one an outlaw — who trained at the same school now drive on opposite sides of the law on a collision course.
stories.notes: Multiple reference car sequences catalogued. Clear rivalry arc. Dated Nov 3, 2025.

stories.one_line_premise: A ghost-level spy — hardened by childhood trauma and war — becomes unstoppable, until enemies discover his one buried weakness: a woman from his past.
stories.notes: Imran Khan inspired protagonist. Multi-arc spy story with age zoom, CIA infiltration, ex-GF vulnerability arc. CGI animated series vision. Dated Apr 6, 2023.

stories.one_line_premise: A decorated war veteran living a humble life as a bus cleaner is recruited by 007 for one last impossible mission — proving his caliber hasn't faded.
stories.notes: Character-brief only. Strong redemption/comeback angle. Inspired by Nawazuddin Siddiqui. Dated Dec 26, 2025.

stories.one_line_premise: A legendary Indian spy is pulled into a covert Indo-Pak-US mission to stop a dangerous arms formula from reaching Turkey — then must outwit the villain's vengeful daughter.
stories.notes: Detailed mission brief, villain arc, car chase sequence, multiple supporting characters. Dated Dec 1, 2025.

stories.one_line_premise: A Squid Game-style story where a group of family and friends unknowingly become players in a deadly Monopoly-like power game — until betrayal and murder reveal who the real 'Maalik' is.
stories.notes: Murder mystery meets Squid Game via Monopoly. Strong suspense tone set. Dated Oct 21, 2025.

stories.one_line_premise: How many grandmasters are watching a prodigy rise? A chess or strategy prodigy story inspired by Hikaru no Go.
stories.notes: Title-only with a reference video. Zero content written. Dated Sep 18, 2023.

stories.one_line_premise: A world-renowned puppet maker falls obsessively in love with his greatest creation — until a disastrous performance shatters both the puppet and his illusion.
stories.notes: Very polished synopsis. Clear arc, setting, theme. Inspired by song Gumsum Gumsum. Dated Dec 29, 2025.

stories.one_line_premise: A woman wastes years digging for buried gold — only to discover she was the gold all along.
stories.notes: Parable-style, self-worth theme. Short but complete idea. Dated Oct 25, 2025.

stories.one_line_premise: A supremely confident man bets his entire life on conquering the infinite ocean — and across three ages learns that the real victory was always the journey, not the depth.
stories.notes: Non-linear, three-age structure. Strong philosophical theme. Dated Oct 25, 2025.

stories.one_line_premise: A man stuck in grief for five years begins dreaming of the happier alternate life he could have had — but the connection between realities is a two-way street with dangerous consequences.
stories.notes: Alternate-reality psychological thriller. Inspired by song 'Darmiya'. Core theme: moving on. Dated Oct 13, 2025.

stories.one_line_premise: A trilogy about the breaking points in relationships — official rifts, personal rifts, and the moment everything finally falls apart.
stories.notes: Three-episode structure proposed. No story. Dated Aug 17, 2025.

stories.one_line_premise: A traditional Indian wedding is experienced entirely through the lens of a video game announcer and 8-bit visual effects.
stories.notes: Clear concept with defined scenes. Gag-based format. Dated Nov 3, 2025.

stories.one_line_premise: Two women across different timelines share a split consciousness — one in 2000s, one in 1990s — connected by diverted black magic and fighting what fate has already decided.
stories.notes: Punjabi film format. Dual-timeline soul-link concept. Character arcs for A, B, Baba, Dr. Tantric defined. Dated Jul 4, 2025.

stories.one_line_premise: An anthology series of 10–30 minute episodes where strangers share stories, secrets, and laughter aboard Indian trains.
stories.notes: Repeatable IP concept. 3 specials listed, 1 full episode idea sketched. Dated Dec 3, 2025.

stories.one_line_premise: A jealous third-wheel can't process that his friend is marrying the exact twin of his own ex-girlfriend — and chaos unfolds when he contacts her.
stories.notes: Quirky rom-com premise with sequel potential. Rap track concept noted. No date listed.

stories.one_line_premise: A tiger cub raised by an orangutan must reunite his estranged brothers and defend their jungle from a human invasion — guided by the values of the mother who raised him.
stories.notes: Full story structure across three acts. Themes: revenge, loyalty, identity, fatherhood. Lion King meets Jungle Book. No date listed.

stories.one_line_premise: A temple that holds the fallen hearts — title and mood only, awaiting a story.
stories.notes: Title only. No content. Dated Sep 27, 2022.
